info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: samparcanam = miSrIkaraRam  ' pfRAti pfkte ( pfNkte ) samparke yO parcayati parcati ' (Slo. 51) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'A tvA pfRaktvindriyaM rajaH sUryo na raSmiBiH' (f0 1841) ApfRaktu pUrayatu
'kAmamApfRa durmanmAnaM sumantuBiremizA pfcImahi' (f0 11297) izA annena ApfcImahi santarpayAmaH
